title: A Tasty Entry Point Into Darden Restaurants International
text: Darden Restaurants International (NYSE: DRI) and the entire sit-down restaurant industry have had a hard time with the reopening recovery. title: DARDEN RESTAURANTS TO HOST FISCAL 2022 FOURTH QUARTER CONFERENCE CALL ON JUNE 23
text: ORLANDO, Fla. , June 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Darden Restaurants, Inc., (NYSE: DRI) plans to release its fiscal 2022 fourth quarter financial results before the market opens on Thursday, June 23, 2022, with a conference call to follow at 8:30 am ET.
